items.title: Bucks’ Kevin Porter Jr. To Pick Up Player Option
items.author: Hoops Rumors
items.body_excerpt: Bucks’ Kevin Porter Jr. To Pick Up Player Option Hoops Rumors

items.title: Sources: Milwaukee Bucks guard Kevin Porter Jr. is exercising his $5.39 million player option for the 2026-27 season. The 25-year-old guard will remain a key piece for the Bucks in the post Giannis Antetokounmpo era.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: Milwaukee Bucks guard Kevin Porter Jr. is exercising his $5.39 million player option for the 2026-27 season. The 25-year-old guard will remain a key piece for the Bucks in the post Giannis Antetokounmpo era.
